calendar.matters:
STATS DISPOSITION
Off Calendar Jun-12-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Bank of America is apearing represented by Donald Sherill, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Valery Stsefanovich not appearing.

This matter was originally sent to this department 505 from department 206 being set forth with as a default matter.

This matter was continued to today's date to allow counsel an oppertunity to provide paper pleadings and a proposed judgment for Judge Tong's review.

Based on the documents filed consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against Defendant Valery Stsefanovich, as follows:

Damages: $11,353.32
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $443.61

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $11,796.93

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Continued To Jun-12-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Valery Stsefanovich

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter;

Matter not reported.

Plaintiff Bank of America is present represented by Jonathan Vaknin, Esq.
Defendant Valery Stsefanovich is not present

As Mr. Vaknin does not have any supporting papers, document, or a proposed judgment to show Judge Tong this morning, this matter is continued to June, 12, 2026 at 9:00am in dept 505 to give him time to prepare his evidence.
